channel.title: Zhangli Zhou research news
channel.description: Research updates, accepted papers, code, and demo news from Zhangli Zhou.

item.title: Congratulations to Zhangli Zhou (first author) on having the paper "Dual Reactive Planning for Heterogeneous Robots With Evolving Capabilities in Unknown Environments" accepted by IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L).
item.description: Dual Reactive Planning for Heterogeneous Robots With Evolving Capabilities in Unknown Environments has been accepted by IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L).
